creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On recent ALPHA-5 (11.0-ALPHA5 #13 r302173: Fri Jun 24 14:09:19 CEST 2016 amd64) updating and/or compilation/installaion of port math/R fails due to error about missing cairo.so:

[...]
  building HTML index ...
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>   Installing ldconfig configuration file
===>  Installing for R-3.3.0_2
===>   Registering installation for R-3.3.0_2
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/math/R/work/stage/usr/local/lib/R/library/grDevices/libs/cairo.so: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74
